item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: A reminder that tomorrow is pre-paid Raven's Wear day

item.title: A message from the Unity Club:
item.description: Today is the International Day for Cultural Diversity. As we thank God for the many cultures within our school community, we also pray for a greater respect for the differences that make diversity so important and so meaningful. Today, during the high school lunch, students are invited to join us in celebrating our cultural mosaic. Bring $2 to enjoy food at our potluck, or just come enjoy the party for free!

item.title: A message from 7/8 Softball:
item.description: Please see athletic board for tryout times. There will be 2 tryouts each for boys and girls. Make sure to bring your gloves.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: Any high school students interested in helping out with the year-end liturgy, please see Mr. Vonesch at the chaplaincy office today

item.title: A message from the Attendance office:
item.description: Attention all Grade 12 students! As tomorrow is PROM, if you are not attending classes tomorrow, please make sure your parents report your absence either in the messenger app or leave a message on the attendance line. For Grade 12 students who are 18 years old already, you can stop by the Guidance office today and sign the form to report your absence for tomorrow. Thank you!
